calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Victoria Wong, Esq. appeared for plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation.
No appearance by defendant All Persons Interested in the Matter of the validity of the execution and delivery by the City and County of San Francisco, etc.
Default was entered on January 14, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at the default prove-up hearing was filed on January 14, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff City and County of San Francisco, a Municipal Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant All Persons Interested in the Matter of the validity of the execution and delivery by the City and County of San Francisco, etc. as follows:

1) The Court obtained jurisdiction over all interested persons under Code of Civil Procedure Section 861 and Government Code Section 6063.

2) The City has properly brought this action under Code of Civil Procedure Sections 860 through 870.5.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-10-2008 Continued To Jan-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
